title: Eurowrap Large Christmas Nutcracker Gift Bag – Red Festive Soldier Design – Blue Ribbon Handle – Recyclable Paper Bag for Seasonal Wrapping
features: LARGE CHRISTMAS NUTCRACKER GIFT BAG – Measures 33 cm x 26 cm x 14 cm – ideal for clothing, games, toys, or larger presents
FESTIVE NUTCRACKER DESIGN – Bright red with colourful soldiers, candy canes, and seasonal patterns
PREMIUM QUALITY – Made from 210gsm FSC-certified paper for strength and durability
RIBBON HANDLE – Blue ribbon handle with matching “Merry Christmas” gift tag
ECO-FRIENDLY – Fully recyclable paper bag for sustainable seasonal wrapping
description: Bring festive cheer to your gift presentation with the Eurowrap Large Christmas Nutcracker Gift Bag. Featuring a lively red background decorated with colourful nutcracker soldiers, candy canes, sweets, and musical notes, this design is sure to delight. The bold “Merry Christmas” message on the matching gift tag ties the look together perfectly. Measuring 33 cm x 26 cm x 14 cm, this large bag is ideal for bulkier gifts such as clothing, games, boxed toys, or multiple items. Crafted from sturdy 210gsm FSC-certified paper, it ensures reliable strength while remaining fully recyclable for an eco-friendly wrapping choice. The strong blue ribbon handle makes carrying comfortable, and the matching gift tag is ready for your personal message. This bag combines festive fun with practicality, making it a perfect choice for both children and adults during the holiday season.
